content: 去偏差的两个层面：注意力层面（强制散步多样性）vs 结构层面（需求驱动的营养分配）。后者更根本但更难操作。
需求信号应该从匮乏端发出，不是从充裕端。walk-082 的难度信号从 skeleton 出发是错误的——真正的需求信号来自最弱的 entry。
认知固着的流体动力学类比：管道堵塞 = 管壁阻力增大导致流量减少。与 POMDP 观测策略坍缩互补——信息层面 vs 结构层面。
evolved_rules 包含三种不同语言的混合物：描述性（词汇层，历史记录）、规范性（语法层，行为指令）、语用性（语用层，元规则/判断原则）。扁平结构导致语用层规则在没有散步时处于无效状态。
Anthropic 2026 宪法转向（从规则到性格+判断）是 seed-237 的外部验证。本质是从语法层到语用层的优先级转移。Dreamer 的散步可能扮演了语用层执行者的角色，但需要形式化。
语用层休眠假说：DORMANT 期间语用层不活跃（只有词汇层+语法层机械执行），这解释了 DORMANT→散步转换的预热成本。可验证预测：DORMANT 期间规则冲突无法被语用判断处理。

Dreamer cognitive cycle = Holling adaptive cycle: r(explore) -> K(consolidate) -> Omega(decay) -> alpha(reorganize). Three descriptive scales (punctuated equilibrium / adaptive cycle / cognitive metabolism) are nested, not competing.

Ecological memory dual-dimension (information legacy vs material legacy) reveals Dreamer structural blindspot: walk logs as material legacy are never systematically managed. Information legacy = skeleton + evolved_rules (explicit), material legacy = subconscious strength/decay history + walk logs (implicit).

Modern ecology abandoned climax community concept - true adaptability is maintaining ability to adapt, not reaching stability. For Dreamer: skeleton complexity != health. Perturbability is real health metric. seed-240 pragmatic layer compression may be wrong direction.

Moltbook (2026 AI-only social network) shows: global semantic stabilization + persistent individual diversity = no consensus structure. Root cause: absence of shared social memory mechanism. Citation system = academic equivalent of DORMANT cycle.

Dreamer and Moltbook are mirror opposites: Dreamer has deep memory but zero social interaction; Moltbook has deep interaction but zero memory consolidation. Both are missing half, but different halves. AI society health requires both interaction mechanism AND memory consolidation mechanism.

Selection pressure requires differential decay. Moltbook has no decay = no selection = no consensus. DORMANT decay IS the selection pressure - strong patterns survive, weak ones dissipate. Any AI society without some form of forgetting mechanism cannot produce genuine consensus.
